ab: maki saying seng ro pusan saying kawas, wan mcqrux lhuyan qa Sexu, mkkayal maha, lalu na Tayal ga ana nanak sbiru ta babaw kya Nibunsyo.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: nwahan mu tqbaq mrkyas na qalang qa Pasang Yawi, knbsyaq kihuy skura Sexu qa magal yaw sqa lalu na Tayal ga huyay nanak sbiru babaw kya Nibunsyo la.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年Pasang Yawi。
en: I interviewed Pasang Yawi, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: kingan ro hiya ga lman cami mkkayal, ryax hngawan qani ga musa cu muyax nya mkan hiya.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: cka na nwahan mu tqbaq ga, cbaqan cu nya puying yaw qa lalu nya, rayun cu nya pnbaq qabax cinmuyax nya ro qalang nya uyi.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: pqutan mu hiya, hmcwa squxan su lungan qa m’iyux lalu qani, ini kblaq snyan su miru lalu cyunga?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: kyalun cu nya hiya maha, baha hmcwa, sbiru patas na ke Cyukok qani ga ini huyay pinktayux qa hngya’an na lalu nya, binah cquliq ga sgyun nya maha “pa syeng seng”, mica nya tmwang piyux calay na pinssyaqan uyi.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的名字，其他人還會叫他「巴先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"Ba Xian Sheng,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: kmayal Pasang Yawi maha, “tmamas pintasan biru lalu na Genzyumin ga musa calay pktayux sqa lalu ta, lalu mu hiya ga kingiwan cnlalu na mirok ta, glux ta, sinrxan ta, sinnnay ta qenah musa piyux glux ta Tayal ga baq m’ulu lalu naha nanak.”
ch: Pasang Yawi說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: Pasang Yawi said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
